summary: ITER10 PWA (branded manifest + install-prompt button) — ALL OBJECTIVES VERIFIED. Backend: 6/6 new iter10 PWA tests PASS (manifest schema + branding reflection, 3 icon PNGs, index.html PWA tags). Full regression 122/123 (1 pre-existing WS-ordering flake in backend_test.py, unrelated to PWA). Frontend: login+chat smoke clean (0 page/console errors), install-app-button correctly hidden in headless (no beforeinstallprompt fired), and confirmed to render with both install-app-button + install-app-dismiss when beforeinstallprompt is synthetically dispatched, message send works, profile toggle-webpush-button still present.

minor.issue: Pre-existing test backend_test.py::test_ws_subscribe_and_broadcast_on_post expects first frame == 'hello' but server now emits 'presence:update' first. Not caused by this iteration; just a fragile assertion. Safe fix: drain frames until type=='hello' rather than asserting on frame[0].

action_items: (Optional, non-PWA) Harden backend_test.py::test_ws_subscribe_and_broadcast_on_post to drain frames until it sees type=='hello' instead of asserting the first frame.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/pwa.py _load_branding is awaited correctly and short_name derivation (split on '/', trim, <=12 chars) is deterministic — unit-verified via test_manifest_reflects_branding against live /api/branding.

Default icon order: uploaded logo (if any) is FIRST at 512x512 'any', then static /icon-192, /icon-512, /icon-512-maskable. Browsers will prefer the uploaded logo for 512 'any' — intentional and correct.
Manifest paths for default icons are root-relative '/icon-192.png' etc. — these are served by the frontend container at ingress root (verified: 200 image/png for all three).

InstallAppButton.jsx: gated render `if (installed || dismissed || !deferredPrompt) return null;` — confirmed it renders nothing in headless Chromium where beforeinstallprompt never fires. Synthesizing the event in-page makes the button + dismiss appear, which proves the wiring is correct without spoofing anything in production.
InstallAppButton dismiss uses localStorage key panorama_install_dismissed_until with a 7-day suppression — reasonable UX; guards against re-nag.

index.html: <link rel='manifest' href='/api/manifest.webmanifest'> uses absolute path so ingress routes to backend — verified browser-side (manifest href resolves to $REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api/manifest.webmanifest).
apple-touch-icon and icon link use %PUBLIC_URL%/icon-192.png which CRA replaces at build — currently resolves to /icon-192.png (verified: 200 image/png).

success_rate.backend: 100% on iter10 suite (6/6); 122/123 on full regression (1 pre-existing WS-ordering flake, unrelated)

test_credentials: Admin: operations@panoramacoaches.com.au / Pano3666 — unchanged, NOT modified during testing.
seed_data_creation: One probe message 'TEST_iter10 pwa smoke' posted in the default channel via composer (not cleaned — single admin message, low impact).
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA manifest is production-ready. To re-verify quickly: curl $BACKEND/api/manifest.webmanifest | jq — check name matches /api/branding.brand_name, display=='standalone', theme_color=='#FF5A00', icons[] has 192 + 512 + maskable. Static icons: curl -I $BACKEND/icon-192.png (image/png). Frontend install button cannot be verified in real production headless because Chromium only fires beforeinstallprompt when engagement heuristics + manifest + SW criteria are met over time — the component correctly renders nothing when the event hasn't fired, and renders install-app-button + install-app-dismiss the moment it does (confirmed via synthetic event dispatch in automation). The pre-existing WS-ordering flake in backend_test.py::test_ws_subscribe_and_broadcast_on_post is unrelated to iter10 and should be fixed in a separate hygiene pass.
rca of the issue: N/A — iteration 10 is a feature implementation (PWA manifest + icons + install-prompt button). All acceptance criteria verified green.
